title: phaenopyrum uniflorum
intro: Phaenopyrum uniflorum, also known as the Chinese rice flower or rice flower, is a plant species belonging to the family Rutaceae. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of P. uniflorum include reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and promoting wound healing. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or tea, and is also used in herbal supplements and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
